/usr/bin/ar qc libnettycore_fiber.a CMakeFiles/nettycore_fiber_obj.dir/src/fiber/fiber.cc.o CMakeFiles/nettycore_fiber_obj.dir/src/fiber/fiber_pool.cc.o CMakeFiles/nettycore_fiber_obj.dir/src/fiber/scheduler.cc.o CMakeFiles/nettycore_fiber_obj.dir/src/fiber/timer.cc.o CMakeFiles/nettycore_fiber_obj.dir/src/fiber/timing_wheel.cc.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libnettycore_fiber.a
